creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text: If I upgrade to ca_root_nss-3.93_1 , then copy cert.pem to /usr/local/openssl and then reinstall ca_root_nss-3.93_1 then cert.pem is not deleted. So I believe that during the upgrade and during ca_root_nss-3.93 deinstall this file is removed and then during  ca_root_nss-3.93_1 install the file is not installed.
